title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 536.053 - Standing to challenge rule
text:
536.053.  Standing to challenge rule. — Any person who is or may be aggrieved by any rule promulgated by a state agency shall have standing to challenge any rule promulgated by a state agency and may bring such an action pursuant to the provisions of section 536.050.  Such person shall not be required to exhaust any administrative remedy and shall be considered a nonstate party.
(L. 1999 S.B. 1, et al.)
